title: Keycraft Farm Squeezies - 3 Assorted - One Sent At Random
features: Size 10cm long,5cm wide and 6cm high approx
description: KEYCRAFT FARM SQUEEZIES Explore sensory delight with Farm Squeezies – adorable squishy companions that bring joy to every squeeze! Featuring a charming assortment of a cow, pig, and sheep, these cute farm-themed sensory toys are perfect for squashing and squeezing. Engage in tactile exploration with these delightful creatures, offering endless sensory fun. Unleash the cuteness and discover the joy of Farm Squeezies! 3 animals - one sent at random
